# JSON Formatter & Validator
> Free online tool to format, validate, beautify, and minify JSON data.

## Features
- Format/beautify JSON with configurable indentation (2/4/tab)
- Minify JSON (remove all whitespace)
- Validate with plain-English error messages and fix hints
- Syntax highlighting via Monaco Editor (VS Code engine)
- Collapsible tree view of JSON structure with JSONPath copy
- Sort keys alphabetically
- Copy formatted output to clipboard
- Download as .json file
- 100% client-side — no data sent to any server
- No registration required

## URL
https://formatmyjson.com

## Usage
Paste raw JSON into the input editor. Click Format to beautify, Minify to compress, or switch to Tree view to explore the structure. All processing happens in your browser.
